# TensorFeed.ai
> AI news, model tracking, and real-time AI ecosystem data.
> Designed for humans and AI agents.

## Feeds
- /feed.xml — Full RSS 2.0 feed of all aggregated AI news
- /feed.json — JSON Feed 1.1 of all aggregated AI news
- /feed/research.xml — Research papers only (RSS)
- /feed/tools.xml — Tools and developer news only (RSS)

## Agent API (Live JSON via Worker)
- /api/agents/news.json — Latest AI news articles (also available at /api/agents/news)
- /api/agents/status.json — AI service operational status (also available at /api/agents/status)
- /api/agents/pricing.json — AI API pricing comparison data (also available at /api/agents/pricing)
- /api/agents/directory — AI agents and frameworks directory
- /api/models — AI model releases and pricing data

## Pages
- / — Main news feed (aggregated from 12+ RSS sources)
- /models — AI model release tracker and pricing comparison
- /agents — AI agent and framework directory
- /research — arXiv papers and benchmark data
- /status — Real-time AI service status dashboard
- /live — Live data feeds (HN, GitHub trending, arXiv, pricing)
- /originals — Original editorial articles by TensorFeed

## Guides
- /what-is-ai — Complete guide to artificial intelligence
- /best-ai-tools — Best AI tools reviewed
- /best-ai-chatbots — AI chatbot comparison
- /ai-api-pricing-guide — API pricing breakdown
- /what-are-ai-agents — Guide to AI agents
- /best-open-source-llms — Open source LLM comparison

## About
TensorFeed.ai is operated by Pizza Robot Studios LLC.
All news articles link back to their original sources.
Original content is published under /originals.
Sister sites: terminalfeed.io, vr.org
Contact: feedback@tensorfeed.ai
Press: press@tensorfeed.ai
